title: CurrencyRating
description: A snapshot of foreign-exchange rates for a single asset. The asset's own currency is the base; each entry in `rates` gives the exchange rate from that base to a target currency. Example: for an asset denominated in USD, `rates` may contain `{ currencyId: "EUR", rate: 2.2 }`, `{ currencyId: "CAD", rate: 1.1 }`.

quoteId.description: Unique identifier for this FX-quote snapshot.

timestamp.description: Producer timestamp at which the snapshot was emitted, epoch milliseconds.

rates.description: Array of {currencyId, rate} pairs — FX rate from the asset's currency to each listed target currency.

rate.description: Exchange rate from the asset's currency to `currencyId`.
